pi_items.source: Cross-verified in task.json description (line 5), setup_task.sh (line 11 cleanup, line 27 screenshot comment), and export_result.sh (line 12 OUTPUT_PATH definition). Verifier.py also references this path in the feedback.
Verified against verifier.py line 62 which checks 'if file_size > 10240' where 10240 bytes equals 10 KB. The metadata claim of 10 KB minimum is consistent with verifier logic.

Verified against task.json description (line 5) which specifies 'Create a digital drawing consisting of a House and a Sun. The House must have a square/rectangular body and a triangular roof.' Verifier.py confirms these elements in the VLM prompt (lines 108-111) and checks for 'house_visible' and 'sun_visible' (lines 147-157).

Verified against task.json description (line 5) which states 'Use at least two different colors in your drawing.' Verifier.py prompt (line 111) and checking logic (lines 159-162) confirm requirement for multiple colors.

privileged_info_summary: This task requires creating a vector drawing in GCompris using the Vector Drawing activity. The drawing must contain a house with a rectangular body and triangular roof, a sun depicted as a circle, and use at least 2 different colors. The finished drawing must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/drawing_composition.png with a minimum file size of 10 KB. No external dataset is involved; all data is synthetic and generated by the user during task execution.
